ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date of graduation */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., enrolled, graduated, dropped out) */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major field of study */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the student */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the student's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., university, college) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was founded */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the institution */,
  "number_of_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students */,
  "number_of_faculty" INTEGER /* Total number of faculty members */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the institution */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the institution */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ssc_board" (
  "ssc_board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SSC board */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the SSC board */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the SSC board */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the board was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the board */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the board */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the board */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ssc_board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hsc_board" (
  "hsc_board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HSC board */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the HSC board */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the HSC board */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the board was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the board */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the board */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the board */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hsc_board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degrees" (
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the degree */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution offering the degree */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the degree program */,
  "tuition_fee" REAL /* Tuition fee for the degree program */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* Admission requirements for the degree program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("degree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_degrees_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_experience" (
  "work_experience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work experience */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company where the student worked */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the student */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of work experience */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of work experience */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the work experience */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the work experience */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_experience_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "etest_prep" (
  "etest_prep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each e-test preparation course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the e-test preparation course */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved in the course */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date the course was taken */,
  "certificate" TEXT /* URL of the certificate of completion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("etest_prep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mba_programs" (
  "mba_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MBA program */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the MBA program */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution offering the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of the MBA program (e.g., full-time, part-time, online) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the MBA program */,
  "tuition_fee" REAL /* Tuition fee for the MBA program */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* Admission requirements for the MBA program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mba_program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mba_programs_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_openings" (
  "job_opening_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job opening */,
  "employer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employer */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the job */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range offered */,
  "experience_required" INTEGER /* Minimum years of experience required */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for applying to the job */,
  "number_of_openings" INTEGER /* Number of openings available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_opening_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_openings_employer_id FOREIGN KEY ("employer_id") REFERENCES employers ("employer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employers" (
  "employer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the employer */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the employer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the employer */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the employer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the employer */,
  "company_size" INTEGER /* Size of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_applications" (
  "job_application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job application */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "job_opening_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job opening */,
  "resume" TEXT /* Resume submitted by the student */,
  "cover_letter" TEXT /* Cover letter submitted by the student */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the job application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job application (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the interview (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_job_opening_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_opening_id") REFERENCES job_openings ("job_opening_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the salary */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the salary */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Payment frequency (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Details of any additional benefits provided */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the salary */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the salary (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ssc_scores" (
  "ssc_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SSC score */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved in SSC */,
  "ssc_board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SSC board */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the SSC exam was taken */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the score */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade achieved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ssc_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ssc_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ssc_scores_ssc_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("ssc_board_id") REFERENCES ssc_board ("ssc_board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hsc_scores" (
  "hsc_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HSC score */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved in HSC */,
  "hsc_board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HSC board */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the HSC exam was taken */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the score */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade achieved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hsc_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hsc_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hsc_scores_hsc_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("hsc_board_id") REFERENCES hsc_board ("hsc_board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degree_scores" (
  "degree_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree score */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved in the degree */,
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the degree */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the degree was completed */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the score */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade achieved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("degree_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_degree_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_degree_scores_degree_id FOREIGN KEY ("degree_id") REFERENCES degrees ("degree_id")
)
